name: Recovery Labs (after antibiotic cessation)

results.name: Eosinophils (% of WBC)
results.interpretation: Normalized after the offending drugs were stopped.

interpretation: After antibiotics were discontinued, the fevers and shock resolved and the labs improved (normalizing WBC and lactate, down-trending bilirubin/INR/creatinine, resolving eosinophilia). All cultures finalized with no growth. The trajectory — deterioration on escalating antibiotics, rapid recovery once they were stopped — supports a drug-related (rather than infectious) cause.
